---
title: "compare_results"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(here)
library(knitr)

source(here("R/compare_results.R"))
source(here("R/prepare_data.R"))
```

## Input

```{r input}
models = list(
    old = basename(list.dirs("~/htcf_ref/data/yeast_database_modelling/results/20250805/results_20250805_residuals",
                     recursive = FALSE)),
    new = basename(list.dirs("~/htcf_ref/data/yeast_database_modelling/results/20250805/v1.0.0/results_20250805_residuals",
                   recursive = FALSE))
)

get_paths = function(model,
                     basepath_old, 
                     stage3_filename_old = c("interactor_vs_main_result.json",
                                         "stage3_lassocv_significance_results.json"),
                     basepath_new,
                     stage3_filename_new = c("interactor_vs_main_result.json",
                                         "stage3_lassocv_significance_results.json")){
    
    stage3_filename_old = match.arg(stage3_filename_old)
    stage3_filename_new = match.arg(stage3_filename_new)
    
    list(
        old = list(
            file.path(basepath_old, model, "all_data_significant_98-0.json"),
            file.path(basepath_old, model, "topn_significant_90-0.json"),
            file.path(basepath_old, model, stage3_filename_old)),
        new = list(
            file.path(basepath_new, model, "all_data_significant_98-0.json"),
            file.path(basepath_new, model, "topn_significant_90-0.json"),
            file.path(basepath_new, model, stage3_filename_new))
    )
    
}

# Populate path_list here. Structure:
#   list(
#     AFT1 = list(
#       old = list("path/v0/.../all_data_significant_98-0.json",
#                  "path/v0/.../topn_significant_90-0.json",
#                  "path/v0/.../stage3_lassocv_significance_results.json"),
#       new = list("path/v1/.../all_data_significant_98-0.json",
#                  "path/v1/.../topn_significant_90-0.json",
#                  "path/v1/.../stage3_lassocv_significance_results.json")
#     ),
#     ...
#   )
path_list = map(models$old, get_paths,
                "~/htcf_ref/data/yeast_database_modelling/results/20250805/results_20250805_residuals",
                "interactor_vs_main_result.json",
                "~/htcf_ref/data/yeast_database_modelling/results/20250805/v1.0.0/results_20250805_residuals",
                "stage3_lassocv_significance_results.json")
names(path_list) = models$old


```

## Load results

```{r load}
loaded <- load_stage_results(path_list)
```

## Run comparisons

```{r compare}
stages <- c("stage1", "stage2", "stage3")

compare_fns <- list(
    stage1 = compare_stage1,
    stage2 = compare_stage2,
    stage3 = compare_stage3
)

# For each regulator × stage, run the appropriate comparison function and
# collect the per-interactor agreement tibble.
comparisons <- imap_dfr(loaded, function(reg_entry, reg_name) {
    map_dfr(stages, function(stage) {
        a <- reg_entry[[1]][[stage]]
        b <- reg_entry[[2]][[stage]]
        compare_fns[[stage]](a, b) %>%
            mutate(regulator = reg_name, stage = stage, .before = everything())
    })
})
```

## Summary: identical vs different

```{r summary}
comparison_summary <- comparisons %>%
    group_by(regulator, stage) %>%
    summarise(
        n_both   = sum(agreement == "both"),
        n_only_a = sum(agreement == "only_a"),
        n_only_b = sum(agreement == "only_b"),
        identical = n_only_a == 0 & n_only_b == 0,
        .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(stage, !identical, regulator)

comparison_summary %>% kable()
```

```{r summary-counts}
comparison_summary %>%
    count(stage, identical) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = identical, values_from = n,
                names_prefix = "identical_") %>%
    rename(n_different = identical_FALSE, n_identical = identical_TRUE) %>%
    replace_na(list(n_different = 0L, n_identical = 0L)) %>%
    kable()
```

## Differences detail

Regulators where the two versions disagree for at least one stage.

```{r differences}
different_cases <- comparisons %>%
    filter(agreement != "both") %>%
    select(regulator, stage, interactor, agreement,
           starts_with("coef"), starts_with("sign"))  # coef/sign cols present for stage3 only

if (nrow(different_cases) == 0) {
    cat("All regulators are identical across both versions for all stages.\n")
} else {
    different_cases %>%
        arrange(stage, regulator, agreement, interactor) %>%
        kable()
}
```

```{r differences-by-stage}
# Per-stage breakdown of disagreements
for (s in stages) {
    stage_diffs <- different_cases %>% filter(stage == s)
    if (nrow(stage_diffs) == 0) next

    cat(glue("\n### {s}: {nrow(stage_diffs)} differing predictor(s) across ",
             "{n_distinct(stage_diffs$regulator)} regulator(s)\n\n"))

    stage_diffs %>%
        select(regulator, interactor, agreement) %>%
        arrange(regulator, agreement) %>%
        kable() %>%
        print()
}
```
conclusion: see https://github.com/BrentLab/tfbpmodeling/issues/57, the
floating point precision issue is a problem. It is resolved by stage3
